indicators.name: bookshelf
indicators.rationale: The bookshelf takes up a significant portion of the available floor space, reducing the open area suitable for yoga.

indicators.name: potted plant
indicators.rationale: The potted plant is close to the bookshelf, further reducing the available floor space for yoga.

indicators.name: couch
indicators.rationale: The couch is placed against the wall, taking up valuable floor space that could be used for yoga.

indicators.name: floor
indicators.rationale: The floor is partially obstructed by the bookshelf, couch, and potted plant, reducing the available space for yoga.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is moderately suitable for yoga due to the presence of furniture and plants that occupy a significant portion of the floor space. The bookshelf and couch take up valuable space, while the potted plant adds to the visual clutter. The score of 3 reflects the moderate obstruction of the floor space and the presence of furniture that could be moved to create more open space for yoga.
